name: codex-toolkit
description: General-purpose Codex skills for browser automation, image processing, security reviews, GitHub maintenance, provisioning, screenshots, admin UX, and full feature delivery.

interface.longDescription: Adds reusable Codex workflows for browser and Electron automation, deterministic image operations, screenshots, GitHub review and CI fixes, security review and threat modeling, provisioning safety, admin UX refinement, and doc-first feature delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use $feature to run a meaningful feature through plan, review, implementation, and ready-for-merge gates.
Use $playwright for terminal-driven browser automation or $playwright-interactive for a persistent interactive session.
Use $background-remove, $image-utils, $pixel-mask-move, or $segment-anything-model for the matching image workflow.
Use $security-best-practices, $security-ownership-map, or $security-threat-model only for an explicitly requested security task.
Use $gh-address-comments or $gh-fix-ci for GitHub review feedback and failing GitHub Actions checks.
Use $provisioning-flows for safe get-or-create, upsert, entitlement, and reconciliation design.
Use $cabinet-screen-ux-pass to refine an existing cabinet or admin screen without breaking its flow.
Use $screenshot when the user explicitly requests an OS-level desktop or application capture.
